name: plant-ops-dashboard
description: Plant Operations Dashboard - Shift Analysis & Operational Insights

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run migrate
scripts.setup:backend: cd Backend && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
